untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is a trend-following entry signal that describes WHEN to trade (indicator type, regime shifts, price volatility thresholds) and WHY (reduce transaction costs, capture large moves). It contains no position sizing directive, risk percentage, multiplier scale, or scaling trigger. The parameters provided (lookback_period, min_price_move_std_devs, transaction_cost) are entry filters and signal characteristics, not position sizing rules.
